market_pulse: Weekend bookings strong across Strip clubs; David Guetta and Tiësto drive daytime engagement; Hakkasan and OMNIA showing hip-hop trend adoption.

content_gaps.description: Minimal TikTok sound/music editing content compared to competitors; user-generated clips focus on venue aesthetics not sonic identity.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create 15-30s trending audio reels at LIV Beach with high-energy music production behind-the-scenes clips.

content_gaps.description: Live countdown content to event start-times missing from main feed; competitors using Stories aggressively for same-day hype.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Deploy countdown Stories 2-4 hours before peak weekend sets; link to ticket page.

content_gaps.description: No visible creator takeovers or influencer guest posts; other venues leveraging TikTokers for UGC credibility.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Invite micro-influencers (50K-500K followers) for curated Stories/TT takeovers during big DJ sets.
